description: baseline: pretrained T5Chem 4L enc/dec d256 lr5e-4 bs32
exp1: lr=2e-4 wd=0.01 warmup cosine (LR too low)
exp6: bs=64 lr=1e-3 (fewer steps hurt slightly)
exp7: encoder-only mean pooling (decoder cross-attn needed)
exp9: wider MLP head d_model*4 (no improvement)
exp11: freeze encoder 20% (marginal gain too complex)
exp14: GELU activation (breaks pretrained ReLU weights)
exp38: SWA last 30% (too many noisy checkpoints)
exp39: max-autotune (more steps but worse numerics)
exp40: USPTO MT pretrained (seq2seq bias worse for regression)
exp44: enc+dec fusion residual (redundant with cross-attn)
exp45: BOS decoder start (PAD is what pretrained expects)
exp48: layer-wise LR decay 0.8x (overhead fewer steps)
exp57: wd=0.015 (0.02 is the sweet spot)
exp58: Yield: as decoder input (PAD expected)
exp60: head dropout=0.25 (0.3 better with wd=0.02)
exp63: SGD Nesterov (bad for transformer fine-tuning)
exp72: SDPA attention (faster but different numerics)
exp78: SDPA attention (simpler half VRAM within noise)
exp87: no cross-attn pos bias (within noise but safer to keep)
exp91: no encoder embed dropout (within noise)
exp97: freeze encoder 15% (within noise adds complexity)
